check_that_the_scene_is_safe_for_you_and.speak_before: Check that the scene is safe before you touch the patient.
check_that_the_scene_is_safe_for_you_and.agent_hint: Keep the instruction brief and do not advance until the wearer confirms it is safe.

tap_the_person_and_shout_to_check_respon.speak_before: Tap the patient and shout to check if they respond.
tap_the_person_and_shout_to_check_respon.agent_hint: Tell the wearer to keep the camera on the patient while they check.

check_breathing_quickly.speak_before: Look at the chest and face and check breathing quickly.
check_breathing_quickly.agent_hint: Use the live scene and pose context to help the wearer assess whether the patient appears motionless or not breathing normally.
check_breathing_quickly.tool_prompt: Assess whether the patient appears to be lying down, motionless, and not showing obvious normal breathing from the current frame or recent scene context. Return a structured result with uncertainty if the view is insufficient.
check_breathing_quickly.advance_when: the agent explains whether the patient appears motionless or the breathing view is unclear

call_emergency_services_or_direct_someon.speak_before: Call emergency services now or direct a nearby bystander to call immediately.
call_emergency_services_or_direct_someon.agent_hint: Escalate clearly before compressions if help has not already been summoned.

begin_chest_compressions_if_the_person_i.speak_before: If the patient is not breathing normally, begin chest compressions now.
begin_chest_compressions_if_the_person_i.agent_hint: Keep the wording direct and action-focused.

use_an_aed_if_one_is_available.speak_before: If an AED is available, get it immediately and follow its prompts.
use_an_aed_if_one_is_available.agent_hint: Recommend switching to the AED retrieval procedure if the wearer needs help locating one.
